name: the-new-confessions-of-an-economic-hit-man
description: John Perkins' whistleblower account — how the global economic system uses debt to dominate nations, and how to transition from a death economy to a life economy.
useCase: Understanding global debt traps, spotting corporatocracy, recognizing economic manipulation, building sustainable alternatives.
knownRisks: Perkins' claims are disputed by some economists and institutions
The book's tone is confessional and conspiratorial — some readers may find it alarmist
Some specific claims about CIA involvement are difficult to verify independently
